untranslatable_reason: Signal requires microstructure-level data not available in standard OHLCV indicators: (1) 'Limit order sits on book for >60 seconds without adjustment' requires order book depth/time data; (2) 'Limit order price is >2 standard deviations from recent traded prices' requires real-time order book tracking; (3) 'No recent large institutional trades in same direction' requires trade classification and institutional order detection; (4) 'Exit when limit order is cancelled' requires order book event stream. The signal fundamentally relies on detecting stale limit orders and institutional behavior patterns that cannot be derived from price/volume/momentum indicators alone.
translation_notes: This is an advanced market microstructure strategy requiring order book data (Level 2+), trade classification algorithms, and institutional order detection—well beyond standard technical analysis indicators. A backtest engine would need custom data feeds and event detection logic to implement this rule properly.
